subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。全ての指を人差し指の輪に下から入れます。人差し指の糸は手首に落ちます。
subtitle.en: Begin from Opening A. Insert all fingers from below into the index-finger loops. The index-finger strings fall to the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指の2本の糸の上に人差し指を乗せ、2本の糸を人差し指の腹にかけます
subtitle.en: Rest the index fingers on top of the two strings on each little finger, and place the two strings onto the pads of the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指を親指の輪に上から入れ、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Move both index fingers over and pick down into the thumb loops, and pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Remove the thumb strings on both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に親指を下から入れ、輪を移します
subtitle.en: Insert the thumbs from below into the loops on both index fingers, transferring the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左手首の輪を右手で持ち、左人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the loop on the left wrist and place it onto the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 右手首の輪を左手で持ち、右人差し指にかけます
subtitle.en: With the left hand, take the loop on the right wrist and place it onto the right index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の糸を越えて小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the index-finger strings and pick up the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の先で、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With the tips of both index fingers, pick up the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指から糸が外れないように親指で押さえ、両手を向こうに向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Hold the strings on the index fingers down with the thumbs so they do not slip off, turn both hands to the far side, and finish.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の先にかけていた糸を外します
subtitle.en: Remove the strings from the tips of both index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指の糸を静かに外します
左右の人差し指の先で、親指向こう側の糸を取り、親指で押さえます。両手を左右に開くと太陽が沈み、水平線が残ります
subtitle.en: With the tips of both index fingers, pick up the far thumb strings and hold them down with the thumbs. Open both hands to the sides, and the sun sets, leaving the horizon.
